返回本批次

人工智能巨头关闭 Sora 后迪士尼退出 OpenAI 交易

Disney Exits OpenAI Deal After AI Giant Shutters Sora

www.hollywoodreporter.com 作者 timpera 分数 201 评论 2 2026/03/25 05:01
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 令人惊讶的是，OpenAI 将在其 Sora AI 视频应用程序首次推出几个月后关闭该应用程序。
  2. “我们要告别 Sora。向所有使用 Sora 创作、分享它并围绕它建立社区的人：谢谢你们，”该公司在一份声明中表示。 “你用 Sora 所做的事情很重要，我们知道这个消息令人失望。我们很快就会分享更多信息，包括应用程序和 API 的时间表以及有关保存你的作品的详细信息。”
  3. 一位知情人士告诉《好莱坞报道》，迪士尼还将退出去年与 OpenAI 签署的协议，该协议承诺向该公司投资 10 亿美元，并同意授权其部分角色在《索拉》中使用。
  4. 当然，由首席执行官 Sam Altman 领导的 OpenAI 并没有退出人工智能视频业务（人工智能视频是 ChatGPT 应用程序中可以采用的众多工具之一），但独立的 Sora 应用程序似乎将成为其不断发展的野心的牺牲品。
  5. 《Sora》于去年秋天推出，免费使用成熟的知识产权和知名演员，令好莱坞震惊不已。该公司在推出几天后不得不撤回，让好莱坞电影公司和人才能够更好地控制平台上的知识产权和肖像。

Original Summary

  1. In a surprise move, OpenAI will shut down its Sora AI video app, just months after it was first launched.
  2. “We’re saying goodbye to Sora. To everyone who created with Sora, shared it, and built community around it: thank you,” the company said in a statement. “What you made with Sora mattered, and we know this news is disappointing. We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work.”
  3. A source familiar with the matter tells The Hollywood Reporter that Disney is also exiting the deal it signed with OpenAI last year, in which it pledged to invest $1 billion in the company and agreed to license some of its characters for use in Sora.
  4. OpenAI, led by CEO Sam Altman, is not getting out of the AI video business (AI video is one of many tools that can take form in the ChatGPT app), of course, but it appears the standalone Sora app will be a casualty of its evolving ambitions.
  5. Sora launched last fall, shocking and awing Hollywood with its free use of established intellectual property and known actors. The company had to backtrack a few days after it launched, giving Hollywood studios and talent more control over their IP and likenesses on the platform.

评论（默认中文）

maxutility 2026/03/25 10:13
与 Sora 的关闭不同，迪士尼放弃与 OpenAI 的业务“协议”似乎具有新闻价值。六个月前，萨姆·奥尔特曼左右宣布了大规模交易，现在几乎所有令人印象深刻的交易都已失败或大幅缩减。
It seems like Disney’s departure from its business “deal” with OpenAI is newsworthy distinct from the Sora closure. Six months ago Sam Altman was announcing massive deals left and right, now nearly all of the impressive deals have fallen through or been scaled dramatically back.
